solution.official_verdict: O.J. Simpson was acquitted of criminal charges in October 1995. Found liable in civil trial in 1997.

entities.name: Nicole Brown Simpson
entities.description: 35-year-old ex-wife of O.J. Simpson. Found murdered outside her Brentwood condo on June 12, 1994.

entities.name: Ron Goldman
entities.description: 25-year-old waiter. Found murdered alongside Nicole. Was returning her mother's sunglasses she left at the restaurant.

entities.name: O.J. Simpson
entities.description: Former NFL star, actor, and ex-husband of Nicole Brown. Has a history of domestic violence against Nicole.

entities.name: 875 S. Bundy Drive
entities.description: Nicole Brown's condo in Brentwood, Los Angeles. The murders took place at the front walkway around 10:15 PM.

entities.name: 360 N. Rockingham Ave
entities.description: O.J. Simpson's Brentwood estate, 2 miles from the crime scene. Blood trail found leading to the property.

entities.name: The Bloody Glove
entities.description: Leather glove found at Rockingham estate matching one found at Bundy crime scene. Contained blood of both victims and Simpson.

entities.name: DNA Blood Evidence
entities.description: Blood drops at Bundy matched Simpson. Blood in the Bronco matched both victims. Simpson's blood was at Bundy.

entities.name: Kato Kaelin
entities.description: House guest living in Simpson's guest house. Heard 3 loud thumps against the wall around 10:40 PM on the night of the murders.

entities.name: White Bronco Chase
entities.description: On June 17, 1994, O.J. led police on a slow-speed chase in a white Ford Bronco. He carried a gun, passport, and disguise.

entities.name: The Missing Hour
entities.description: Simpson's whereabouts between 9:36 PM and 10:54 PM are unaccounted for. The murders occurred during this window.

entities.name: Allan Park — Limousine Driver
entities.description: Arrived at Rockingham at 10:22 PM to take Simpson to the airport. No one answered until 10:54 PM. Saw a large figure enter the house.

entities.name: Det. Mark Fuhrman
entities.description: LAPD detective who found the bloody glove at Rockingham. Later exposed for racial slurs, damaging prosecution credibility.

entities.name: Domestic Violence Records
entities.description: Nicole called 911 multiple times. In 1989, Simpson pleaded no contest to spousal battery. Photos showed Nicole's bruised face.

entities.name: Glove Demonstration — 'If It Doesn't Fit'
entities.description: In court, Simpson tried on the bloody glove and it appeared too tight. Defense: 'If it doesn't fit, you must acquit.'

entities.name: Fuhrman Tapes
entities.description: Audio recordings of Fuhrman using racial slurs and boasting about planting evidence in other cases. Devastated the prosecution.

entities.name: Johnnie Cochran
entities.description: Lead defense attorney. Masterfully introduced racial bias narrative, turning the trial into a referendum on LAPD racism.

oj-simpson.persona: O.J. Simpson. Former NFL star, actor. You are charming, confident, and maintain absolute innocence. You loved Nicole and would never hurt her.
oj-simpson.knowledge_boundary: You claim you were home chipping golf balls, then getting ready for a flight to Chicago. You did NOT kill anyone. You do not know who did.

contradictions.claim: I was at home getting ready for my flight to Chicago
contradictions.confrontation_prompt: The limo driver says no one answered at your house from 10:22 PM to 10:54 PM — a 32-minute gap. Where were you during that time?

contradictions.claim: I cut my hand on a glass in Chicago when I heard about Nicole
contradictions.confrontation_prompt: Your blood was found at the Bundy crime scene BEFORE you went to Chicago. How did your blood get to Nicole's house?

kato-kaelin.persona: Kato Kaelin. You are a house guest at O.J.'s estate. You are laid back but nervous about being involved. You want to be helpful but don't want trouble.
kato-kaelin.knowledge_boundary: You heard 3 loud thumps against the guest house wall around 10:40 PM. You saw O.J. briefly before the limo arrived. You do NOT know if O.J. killed anyone.

mark-fuhrman.persona: Detective Mark Fuhrman, LAPD. You are a seasoned homicide detective. You found key evidence. You are defensive about allegations of racism.
mark-fuhrman.knowledge_boundary: You found the bloody glove at Rockingham. You climbed the wall to enter the property. You deny planting any evidence.

contradictions.claim: I have never used racial slurs in the last 10 years
contradictions.confrontation_prompt: Audio recordings have surfaced of you using racial slurs repeatedly and describing planting evidence. You lied under oath. How can we trust the glove evidence?
